_comment: Local task fallback. ACRM-row-compatible schema so migration to Supabase is one-shot. Use when ACRM is down OR the work does not justify a full ACRM row.

tasks.title: Verify image paste in AgentRemote chat and embedded tmux terminal
tasks.description: Confirm the already-shipped v1.4.7 paste path lets Richard paste screenshots into both the AgentRemote main chat and the embedded terminal/xterm path.
tasks.notes: Code shipped in 2f4a2c2. Need live paste check after canonical AgentRemote relaunch.

tasks.title: Add dynamic post-startup injection fields
tasks.description: Add three editable text inputs adjacent to startup_slash in AgentRemote add/edit settings. Each field represents a separate line to inject after session start.
tasks.notes: Persist to agents.json using a registry-driven field, then test add/edit save behavior.

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded startup commands with registry-driven lines
tasks.description: Move hardcoded startup injections such as /color-style behavior into dynamic registry values consumed by launch-agent.sh.
tasks.notes: Preserve runtime safety: do not reintroduce delayed generic send-keys for Codex. Tests must prove dynamic lines are runtime-scoped and argv-safe.

tasks.title: Run lint/review agents and merge cleanly
tasks.description: After implementation, run focused tests and use cheap review agents for lint/static-review and code-review before merge, push, cleanup, and canonical AgentRemote relaunch.
tasks.notes: Keep worktree boundaries clean; no live iTerm/tmux mutation except canonical relaunch after merge.
